archetypes.name: Aspect Focus
archetypes.desc:
- <Aspect> units can be taken as Troops.
- Non-<Aspect> Troops become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Exemplars of the Shrines
archetypes.desc: - All Exarchs must gain two Exarch powers and they are no longer unique.

archetypes.name: LIIVI
archetypes.desc:
- The army got access to a single Vindicare assassin.
- One HQ selection must be a Farseer.

archetypes.name: Windhost
archetypes.desc:
- Windriders can be taken as Troops.
- All units with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

archetypes.name: Wraithhost
archetypes.desc:
- Wraithblades and Wraithguard units can be taken as Troops.
- Non-<Wraith> Troops become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Ynnari
archetypes.desc:
- Ynnari become "Battle Brothers" for Dark Eldar.
- The army got access to the Ynnari Armory and the Revenant discipline.
- May not select any Legacy.

legacies.name: Fieldcraft
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Alaitoc Craftworld in the Craftworld Armory.

legacies.name: Foresight of the Damned
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Ulthwé Craftworld in the Craftworld Armory.

legacies.name: Stoic Endurance
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Iyanden Craftworld in the Craftworld Armory.

legacies.name: Swordwind
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Biel-Tan Craftworld in the Craftworld Armory.

legacies.name: Wild Host
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Saim-Hann Craftworld in the Craftworld Armory.

traits.name: Children of Khaine
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deadly(6+)" ability for all melee weapons.

traits.name: Children of Morai-Heg
traits.desc: If the unit is below starting strength, each model in it gains +1 attack.

traits.name: Children of Prophecy
traits.desc: The unit may re-roll 1s and 2s for manifestating or denying psychic powers. Only for Psykers.

traits.name: Combined War Host
traits.desc: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Elite Citizenry
traits.desc: The unit may re-roll one to hit roll per activation.

traits.name: Expert Crafters
traits.desc: The unit may re-roll one to wound or armor penetration roll per activation.

traits.name: Grim
traits.desc: Every melee combat result is increased by +2 for the unit.

traits.name: Hail of Doom
traits.desc: The "Shuriken" ability grants an additional -1 to the weapon's AP value.

traits.name: Masterful Shots
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Sunder(1)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Masters of Concealment
traits.desc: The unit gains the benefit of light cover until its first activation.

traits.name: Mobile Fighters
traits.desc: If the unit disembarked from a transport this round, all of its weapons gain the "Decimate" ability for this activation.

traits.name: Savage Blades
traits.desc: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, all of its melee weapons gain -1 AP for this activation.

traits.name: Students of Vaul
traits.desc: The unit ignores temporary vehicle damage on a roll of 4+.
